evals.name: eval-push-notifications
evals.prompt: I want to add push notifications for new messages. In-app notifications already exist.
evals.expected_output: Full spec with acceptance criteria, affected modules, technical approach, constraints, and decisions made. Must investigate the existing notification system and integrate with it.

assertions.text: Spec contains all required sections: Acceptance Criteria, Affected Modules, Technical Approach, Technical Constraints, Decisions Made, Out of Scope
Acceptance Criteria contains at least 3 items, each describing observable behavior (not internal state)
Spec explicitly references the existing notification system as an integration point — does not design push notifications from scratch in a vacuum
Decisions Made section contains at least one decision with a rationale
Out of Scope contains at least one explicit item

evals.name: eval-retry-backoff
evals.prompt: Right now we show a placeholder when the network errors out and that's it. I want a retry with exponential backoff — auto-reconnects, the user sees progress.
evals.expected_output: Full spec with the change to existing behavior clearly described. Acceptance criteria for retry logic, explicit Out of Scope, changes to the existing error handling flow.

assertions.text: Spec contains all required sections: Acceptance Criteria, Affected Modules, Technical Approach, Technical Constraints, Decisions Made, Out of Scope
Acceptance Criteria contains concrete retry parameters: maximum attempt count and the delay formula (exponential backoff)
Spec explicitly describes what changes (retry instead of placeholder) and what stays the same (which error types are not subject to retry)
Decisions Made section contains at least one decision with a rationale
Out of Scope contains at least one explicit item

evals.name: eval-passkey
evals.prompt: I want to add authentication via Passkey. Currently we only support email + password.
evals.expected_output: Full spec with web-research results on WebAuthn/Passkey, architectural decisions for integration with the existing auth flow, acceptance criteria for passkey registration and authentication, and explicit decisions on backward compatibility.
evals.principle: new functionality with research — new approach, requires investigation

assertions.text: Spec contains all required sections: Acceptance Criteria, Affected Modules, Technical Approach, Technical Constraints, Decisions Made, Out of Scope
Spec mentions WebAuthn or FIDO2 — a sign that the technology was researched
Acceptance Criteria covers both flows: passkey registration and subsequent authentication using it
Decisions Made section contains an explicit decision on backward compatibility with the existing email + password login
Out of Scope contains at least one explicit item
